creator: devel@galeracluster.com
text: To our knowledge, the last use for galera package has been by databases/mariadb103-server and databases/mysqlwsrep57-server. Both of them seem to have removed from the ports. Therefore it does not make sense to fix galera anymore, it has been superseded by databases/galera26 (used by databases/mariadb104-server onwards).
